name: Anaplan Blog
description: Blog posts from Anaplan covering connected planning, FP&A, supply chain, and enterprise planning topics.
notes: No RSS/Atom feed discovered on https://www.anaplan.com/blog/ (all /feed/, /rss/, /feed.xml, /atom.xml, /index.xml, /rss.xml paths return 404). Posts pulled via HTML scraping of the blog listing page; the page does not expose publish dates, so saved posts use date:"" and the 0000-00-00- filename prefix.

feeds.error: listing page exposes no publish dates; cannot place posts in window without fabricating dates
